notes.note: Cicero wants Atticus's complete report on the Tigellius affair (see 13.49-13.50); the Sardinian singer of Caesar's circle, estranged from him, remains a source of anxiety and gossip.

notes.anchor: on the eighth before the Kalends
notes.note: The Roman calendar counted backward inclusively from the Kalends (1st), Nones, and Ides; "the eighth before the Kalends" of the following month is the 23rd or 25th by our reckoning, depending on the month's length.
